LanguageData.MSSFP_AICore_SwitchPersonalityDesc: Pick which AI persona drives this core. Affects chatter style, letters, and art flavour.
LanguageData.MSSFP_AICore_CreateArtDesc: Toggle on to have colonists haul {0} units of input material. Held: {1}.\nThe core then produces a sculpture in the active personality's style.
LanguageData.MSSFP_AICore_NoSpawnRoom: {0} can't find space to drop the finished sculpture. Clear a tile near the core.
LanguageData.MSSFP_PonderingOrb_PickPersona_Blurb: The Pondering Orb is online but empty. Choose which AI persona to install. This decision is permanent.
LanguageData.MSSFP_PonderingOrb_PickPersona_NoneAvail: No AI personas are loaded. The orb will run on minimal firmware until a mod adds personalities.
LanguageData.MSSFP_LoadedCore_DeployDesc: Place a blueprint for a new Pondering Orb that will house this persona core. Colonists will haul steel, components, and this core to the build site. When construction completes, the stored avatar wakes up in the new chassis.
